productDisplayName: Puma Men's Splash Navy Blue Flip Flop
description: This energetic pair of Splash flip-flops from puma are great for casual wear. The straps coupled with a designed footbed in the same combination along with a tinge of white adds up for maximum impact. The circular grooves on the outsole offer a bgrippy support, making this pair perfect for the pool side and the beach. Team it with jeans and tees from myntra for that absolutely casual look.Upper Quick-drying EVA upper for dry comfort for the feet Thong construction to hold the forefoot in place, and added comfort and style Midsole Soft, cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Brand name printed on the footbed for style Outsole TPR outsole with round suction points all over for grip and traction shoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
